questions.question: Explain the difference between a matching and a vertex cover in graph theory.
expectedPoints: Matching: set of edges without common vertices
Vertex cover: set of vertices that covers all edges
They are complementary concepts related by Kőnig's theorem in bipartite graphs

questions.question: Describe Hall's marriage theorem and its significance in bipartite matching problems.
expectedPoints: Provides necessary and sufficient condition for perfect matching in bipartite graphs
Condition: For every subset S of one partition, |N(S)| ≥ |S|
